title: Roblox Q2 2024 Earnings Preview
text: Roblox (RBLX) to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in the Cards? Earnings Report Date: August 1, 2024. Key Financial Expectations: Revenue forecast of $894.94 million (up 14.63% year-over-year), Loss per share estimate of 37 cents (improved from 46 cents loss in prior year), Roblox has beaten earnings estimates for four consecutive quarters, averaging a 10.28% surprise. Performance Drivers: The company is expected to benefit from user and developer growth and strength in daily user engagement levels. Analysts anticipate continued momentum from Q1 2024, when the platform saw strong improvements in bookings and daily active users (DAUs). Key Metrics to Watch: Daily Active Users (DAUs) consensus estimate of 76.4 million, Hours Engaged projected at 16.63 billion, Bookings estimated at $897 million. Growth Factors: The platform continues expanding its user base globally, particularly among 9-12 year-olds. Users aged 13+ remain the largest contributors to revenue growth. Headwinds: Margin pressure is expected due to increased investments and some amount of fixed costs during the quarter. Analyst Outlook: Roblox carries a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) rating with a strong Earnings ESP of +33.7%, suggesting potential for an earnings beat.
